_provenance.note: curated item degradation paths (downgrade ladders); editorial — owner-reviewed

records.source_token: Your ring of dueling crumbles to dust.
After at least one charge has been used, an amulet of glory can be recharged by using it on either the Fountain of Uhld or the Fountain of Heroes.
The fully charged scythe will last for 16.66 hours of continuous combat before reverting to its uncharged form.
Eventually it will degrade to Dharok's helm 75, then 50, then 25 and finally 0 at which point the equipment will be unusable until repaired.
